NEWBORN.eligibilityNote_fil: Hiwalay ang newborn package sa claim ng nanay. Dapat maayos ang maternity o member eligibility para ma-file ang benefit ng sanggol.
NEWBORN.eligibilityNote_en: The newborn package is separate from the mother's claim. The maternity or member eligibility must be in order for the baby's benefit to be filed.

NHTS.eligibilityNote_fil: Kung indigent o NHTS ang miyembro o ina, puwedeng magamit ang newborn package at maaari ring humingi ng tulong sa Malasakit Center kung available.
NHTS.eligibilityNote_en: If the member or mother is indigent or under NHTS, the newborn package may be used and Malasakit Center help may also be available.

SENIOR.eligibilityNote_fil: Kung senior citizen ang pangunahing miyembro, puwedeng dependent ang newborn basta valid ang PhilHealth eligibility ng miyembro.
SENIOR.eligibilityNote_en: If the primary member is a senior citizen, the newborn may be a dependent as long as the member's PhilHealth eligibility is valid.

PWD.eligibilityNote_fil: Kung active ang PhilHealth membership o dependent coverage ng miyembro, puwedeng gamitin ang newborn package. Ang PWD discount ay hiwalay at depende sa actual patient-beneficiary.
PWD.eligibilityNote_en: If the member's PhilHealth membership or dependent coverage is active, the newborn package may be used. The PWD discount is separate and depends on the actual patient-beneficiary.

BREAST_CANCER.packageName_fil: Z-Benefit Package para sa Breast Cancer
BREAST_CANCER.preAuthNote_fil: Kailangan ng pre-authorization mula sa PhilHealth bago magsimula ang treatment. Ang ospital ang mag-a-apply para sa inyo. Tumatagal ng 7 araw ang proseso.
BREAST_CANCER.preAuthNote_en: Pre-authorization from PhilHealth is required before treatment begins. The hospital applies on your behalf. Process takes up to 7 working days.
BREAST_CANCER.coverageNote_fil: Hanggang ₱1.4 milyon para sa buong treatment course. Sinasaklaw ang chemotherapy, surgery, at radiation therapy.
BREAST_CANCER.coverageNote_en: Up to ₱1.4 million for the full treatment course. Covers chemotherapy, surgery, and radiation therapy.
BREAST_CANCER.packageAccreditationNote_fil: Mahalagang paalala: ang general PhilHealth accreditation ng ospital ay hindi awtomatikong ibig sabihin na contracted na sila para sa specialized o Z-benefit package na ito. I-verify sa ospital at sa PhilHealth coordinator kung current contracted health facility sila para sa mismong package.
BREAST_CANCER.packageAccreditationNote_en: Important: a hospital's general PhilHealth accreditation does not automatically mean it is contracted for this specialized or Z-benefit package. Verify with the hospital and PhilHealth coordinator that it is a current contracted health facility for this exact package.

LEUKEMIA.preAuthNote_en: Pre-authorization from PhilHealth is required before treatment begins. The hospital applies on your behalf. Process takes up to 7 working days.
LEUKEMIA.coverageNote_fil: Ang official package para sa standard-risk pediatric acute lymphoblastic leukemia ay ₱500,000. Ang high-risk ALL at ibang leukemia types ay hiwalay na pathways at dapat i-verify sa PhilHealth at treating center.
LEUKEMIA.coverageNote_en: The official package for standard-risk pediatric acute lymphoblastic leukemia is ₱500,000. High-risk ALL and other leukemia types follow separate pathways and should be verified with PhilHealth and the treating center.

KIDNEY_TRANSPLANT.coverageNote_fil: Ang official kidney transplant Z-Benefit ay ₱865,000 para sa covered transplant pathway. May hiwalay pang post-transplant medicine support package sa mas bagong circulars.

PERITONEAL_DIALYSIS.preAuthNote_en: Pre-authorization from PhilHealth is required before treatment begins. The hospital applies on your behalf. Process takes up to 7 working days.
PERITONEAL_DIALYSIS.coverageNote_fil: Para sa CAPD, may official package pathways mula adult CAPD support hanggang mas mataas na CAPD with post-services packages. Ang amount na ipinapakita rito ay nasa verified 2024-0036 range at maaaring umabot sa ₱510,140 depende sa pathway.
PERITONEAL_DIALYSIS.coverageNote_en: For CAPD, official package pathways range from adult CAPD support to higher CAPD with post-services packages. The amount shown here is within the verified 2024-0036 range and may reach ₱510,140 depending on the pathway.

OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.eligibilityNote_fil: Lahat ng Pilipino ay maaaring mag-avail. Para sa psychiatric cases, dapat 10 taong gulang pataas. Para sa neurologic cases, lahat ng edad ay maaaring saklaw.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.eligibilityNote_en: All Filipinos may avail. For psychiatric cases, the patient must be at least 10 years old. For neurologic cases, all ages may be covered.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.coverageNote_fil: Taunang outpatient package ito. Saklaw nito ang screening, assessment, diagnostics, follow-up visits, psychosocial support, at essential medicines sa contracted facility.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.coverageNote_en: This is an annual outpatient package. It covers screening, assessment, diagnostics, follow-up visits, psychosocial support, and essential medicines at a contracted facility.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.variantUsed_fil: Variant used ngayon: General outpatient mental health package
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.variantUsed_en: Variant used now: General outpatient mental health package
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.sourceDetail_fil: Source line: PhilHealth Benefits page - outpatient mental health services at P9,000/year for General and P16,000/year for Specialty.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.sourceDetail_en: Source line: PhilHealth Benefits page - outpatient mental health services at PHP 9,000/year for General and PHP 16,000/year for Specialty.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.packageAccreditationNote_fil: Available lamang ito sa contracted health facilities for specialized patient care para sa outpatient benefit packages. I-confirm muna sa facility bago magpa-schedule.
OUTPATIENT_MENTAL_HEALTH.packageAccreditationNote_en: This is available only at contracted health facilities for specialized patient care for outpatient benefit packages. Confirm with the facility before scheduling.

OHAT.eligibilityNote_fil: Para sa General package, adults 18 years old pataas. Para sa Specialized package, children at adolescents 0-17 years old. Dapat sa DOH-designated HIV treatment hub o satellite treatment hub.
OHAT.eligibilityNote_en: For the General package, adults 18 years old and above. For the Specialized package, children and adolescents 0-17 years old. Service must be through a DOH-designated HIV treatment hub or satellite treatment hub.
OHAT.coverageNote_fil: Taunang outpatient package ito para sa HIV treatment. Saklaw nito ang diagnostics, antiretroviral treatment support, at ibang covered outpatient HIV care sa designated hub.
OHAT.coverageNote_en: This is an annual outpatient package for HIV treatment. It covers diagnostics, antiretroviral treatment support, and other covered outpatient HIV care at a designated hub.
OHAT.variantUsed_fil: Variant used ngayon: General OHAT package (adult)
OHAT.variantUsed_en: Variant used now: General OHAT package (adult)
OHAT.sourceDetail_fil: Source line: PhilHealth Benefits page - OHAT package at P30,000/year for General at P39,000/year for Specialized.
OHAT.sourceDetail_en: Source line: PhilHealth Benefits page - OHAT package at PHP 30,000/year for General and PHP 39,000/year for Specialized.
OHAT.packageAccreditationNote_fil: Available lamang ito sa DOH-designated HIV treatment hubs at satellite treatment hubs na accredited para sa OHAT. I-confirm muna ang hub designation at package availability.
OHAT.packageAccreditationNote_en: This is available only at DOH-designated HIV treatment hubs and satellite treatment hubs accredited for OHAT. Confirm the hub designation and package availability first.

ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.eligibilityNote_fil: Ang package na ito ay para sa covered rabies post-exposure prophylaxis cases, lalo na sa Category III exposure, Category II head and neck exposure, at repeat exposure cases.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.eligibilityNote_en: This package is for covered rabies post-exposure prophylaxis cases, especially Category III exposure, Category II head and neck exposure, and repeat exposure cases.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.coverageNote_fil: Saklaw nito ang rabies vaccine, rabies immune globulin, local wound care, tetanus support, antibiotics, at supplies sa PhilHealth-accredited Animal Bite Treatment Center.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.coverageNote_en: This covers rabies vaccine, rabies immune globulin, local wound care, tetanus support, antibiotics, and supplies at a PhilHealth-accredited Animal Bite Treatment Center.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.sourceDetail_fil: Source line: PhilHealth Benefits page - Animal Bite Treatment Package at P5,850.00.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.sourceDetail_en: Source line: PhilHealth Benefits page - Animal Bite Treatment Package at PHP 5,850.00.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.packageAccreditationNote_fil: Available lamang ito sa PhilHealth-accredited Animal Bite Treatment Centers. I-confirm muna na accredited ang bite center bago magpa-claim.
ANIMAL_BITE_TREATMENT.packageAccreditationNote_en: This is available only at PhilHealth-accredited Animal Bite Treatment Centers. Confirm that the bite center is accredited before claiming.
